auth.label: API Key
auth.placeholder: Your Financial Modeling Prep API key
auth.description: Financial Modeling Prep API key passed as the apikey query parameter. Get or manage your key in the developer dashboard: https://site.financialmodelingprep.com/developer/docs/dashboard.

actions.name: get_analyst_estimates
actions.description: Retrieve analyst estimate rows for one stock symbol.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to query, such as AAPL.

period.description: The financial statement period to retrieve.

page.description: The zero-based result page to retrieve.

limit.description: The maximum number of analyst estimate rows to return.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving analyst estimates.

items.description: A row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

actions.name: get_asset_quote
actions.description: Retrieve the latest quote for a commodity, cryptocurrency, forex pair, or index.

assetType.description: The market data asset family to quote.

symbol.description: The asset symbol to quote, such as BTCUSD, EURUSD, GCUSD, or ^GSPC.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving a non-stock market quote.

quote.description: A row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

actions.name: get_balance_sheet_statement
actions.description: Retrieve balance sheet statement rows for one stock symbol from Financial Modeling Prep.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to query, such as AAPL.

period.description: The financial statement period to retrieve.

limit.description: The maximum number of statement rows to return.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving balance sheet statement rows.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol.

date.description: The statement date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

period.description: The statement period returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

items.description: A financial statement row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

items.description: A row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

actions.name: get_historical_prices
actions.description: Retrieve historical daily OHLCV prices for one stock symbol from Financial Modeling Prep.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to query, such as AAPL.

from.description: The inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: The inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving historical daily prices.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

date.description: The trading date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

open.description: The opening price for the trading day.

high.description: The highest price for the trading day.

low.description: The lowest price for the trading day.

close.description: The closing price for the trading day.

adjClose.description: The adjusted closing price for the trading day.

volume.description: The trading volume for the trading day.

items.description: A historical OHLCV price row.

actions.name: get_market_movers
actions.description: Retrieve the current biggest gainers, losers, or most active stocks from Financial Modeling Prep.

type.description: The market mover list to retrieve from Financial Modeling Prep.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving a market mover list.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol.

price.description: The latest price returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

dayLow.description: The lowest price during the current trading day.

dayHigh.description: The highest price during the current trading day.

exchange.description: The exchange returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

open.description: The opening price for the current trading day.

timestamp.description: The quote timestamp returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

items.description: A normalized stock quote row.

movers.description: The stock quote rows in the requested market mover list.

The directory rows.

actions.name: search_company_screener
actions.description: Search companies with Financial Modeling Prep screener filters.

marketCapMoreThan.description: Only include companies above this market cap.

marketCapLowerThan.description: Only include companies below this market cap.

priceMoreThan.description: Only include companies above this share price.

priceLowerThan.description: Only include companies below this share price.

betaMoreThan.description: Only include companies above this beta.

betaLowerThan.description: Only include companies below this beta.

volumeMoreThan.description: Only include companies above this volume.

volumeLowerThan.description: Only include companies below this volume.

dividendMoreThan.description: Only include companies above this dividend value.

dividendLowerThan.description: Only include companies below this dividend value.

exchange.description: The exchange filter supported by Financial Modeling Prep.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input for searching companies with screener filters.

items.description: A row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

actions.name: search_names
actions.description: Search Financial Modeling Prep securities by company or security name.

query.description: The company or security name fragment to search for.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

exchange.description: The exchange filter supported by Financial Modeling Prep.

inputSchema.description: The input for searching Financial Modeling Prep security names.

items.description: A row returned by Financial Modeling Prep.

actions.name: search_symbols
actions.description: Search Financial Modeling Prep stock symbols by ticker fragment or company name.

query.description: The ticker fragment or company name to search for.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

exchange.description: The exchange filter supported by Financial Modeling Prep.

inputSchema.description: The input for searching Financial Modeling Prep stock symbols.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol.

items.description: A stock search result returned by Financial Modeling Prep.
